title: SpiderMan's Webshooter
description: This mod adds a new item called Web Shooter, that lets you swing around like a grapling gun
body:
# SpiderMan's Webshooter This mod adds a new Item called Web Shooter Web Shooter allows you to swing around the minecraft world like spiderman does around New York All you need is a bunch of Cobweb , to shoot ofcourse ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40d1e1d26fc32eefa4f6d589afbae9371c757fe6.png)
**the texture of Web Shooter is different than shown in the image above**
